title: Conduct and Report of Assessment. The Inspectors shall proceed to the
content: 56 establishment and present the Authority to Assess to the agency. A responsible 57 representative of the LMA shall receive and sign a copy of the said Authority. The 58 Assessment shall be conducted in the presence of such representative. 59 60 A responsible representative of the LMA shall include the following persons: 61 20 a. the sole-proprietor, president, partner, director, incorporator, vice president, 1 manager duly registered with the Department; 2 b. any other officers holding managerial positions duly registered with the 3 Department; or 4 5 c. any rank-and-file employee of the company/agency duly registered with the 6 Department. 7 8
